title: Saturn’s Failure Echoes Upward
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Vegapunk, World Government, York as Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.
scene: Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: EGGHEAD, 2 WEEKS PRIOR

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are some anomalous readings coming from the power station!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You can say that again...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Monitor for any fluctuations in particle density and neutron Flux.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The energy used by the Seraphim is meant to gradually increase over time.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This could be a grave error if we miscalculated.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait, aren't these numbers different from our earlier confirmed readings?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes, and the rate of reaction is increasing, too! But the power station seems stable...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hmm... this data seems to indicate...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That someone has tampered with the mother flame to steal its energy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Every single data point related to the Power Station...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: has been carefully modified!! to pull this off, the culprit has to be...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: A vega- punk!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Was it lilith?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'm afraid the three of us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...are the only ones with ironclad alibis.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: An insane amount of energy was stolen!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So we have to observe the other four to determine who is responsible!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Especially with...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have to put our brains into offline stealth mode, too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right, if our memories of this get uploaded to punk records then lil---, I mean the culprit will know were onto them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: One week before the present

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ATTENTION!! I've identified the culprit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WHAT IT?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's York!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The memories she's been synchronizing with punk records are phony!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I've also confirmed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that the surveillance snails at the scene of the crime were tampered with, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Why would she do such a thing?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...and my bad, Lilith!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've also found evidence that suggests someone deployed the weaponized sea beasts without authorization!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A jamming white transgender snail was also found in our investigation!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know!!! We can reconstruct the call data directly from our long-distance transgender snail!!

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: Dr. veganpunk is researching the void century.

dialogue.speaker: World Government
dialogue.text: She rang Mary Geoise!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No wonder Cipher Pol keeps coming here to snoop around!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Aftermath through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
